description: Contact Center AI Insights is a Google Cloud service for analyzing contact center conversations and related customer-experience data. It provides resources for conversations, analysis, metrics, settings, and related insights within Google Cloud projects and locations.
summary: Google Contact Center AI Insights exposes a REST API at `https://contactcenterinsights.googleapis.com/` authenticated with Google Cloud OAuth access tokens, plus a public MCP endpoint at `https://contactcenterinsights.googleapis.com/mcp`.

surfaces.name: Contact Center AI Insights MCP server
Contact Center AI Insights REST API
